profile_summary: Leisure traveler (mid-high budget) prioritizing food & dining, local culture, central location.

recommendations.justification: The Grand Court, Mexico City ranks #1 for this traveler on food & dining (+0.92), local culture (+0.87), central location (+0.92), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The breakfast spread was extensive and genuinely delicious."

supporting_evidence.quote: The breakfast spread was extensive and genuinely delicious.
Great bars and clubs right around the corner, perfect for a night out.
On-site restaurant was a highlight — beautifully prepared local dishes.

recommendations.justification: The Grand Continental, Tokyo ranks #2 for this traveler on food & dining (+0.85), local culture (+0.85), central location (+0.89), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The breakfast spread was extensive and genuinely delicious."

supporting_evidence.quote: The breakfast spread was extensive and genuinely delicious.
On-site restaurant was a highlight — beautifully prepared local dishes.
Outstanding dining; we never felt the need to eat elsewhere.

recommendations.justification: The Royal Lumiere, Istanbul ranks #3 for this traveler on food & dining (+0.91), local culture (+0.81), central location (+0.79), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Fantastic for families — connecting rooms, a kids' club, and high chairs at breakfast."

supporting_evidence.quote: Fantastic for families — connecting rooms, a kids' club, and high chairs at breakfast.
On-site restaurant was a highlight — beautifully prepared local dishes.
Perfect central location, walking distance to all the main sights.
